name: hard delete modifies state
source: fromAll().foreachStream().when({ $init: function() { return { a: 0 }; }, type1: function(s, e) { s.a++; return s; }, $deleted: function(s, e) { s.deleted = 1; return s; } }).outputState()

name: hard delete on uninitialized partition
source: fromAll().foreachStream().when({ $init: function() { return {}; }, type1: function(s, e) { s.a = 1; return s; }, $deleted: function(s, e) { s.deleted = 1; return s; } }).outputState()

name: delete ignored when no handler
source: fromAll().foreachStream().when({ $init: function() { return { a: 0 }; }, type1: function(s, e) { s.a++; return s; } }).outputState()

name: soft delete via metadata
source: fromAll().foreachStream().when({ $init: function() { return { a: 0 }; }, type1: function(s, e) { s.a++; return s; }, $deleted: function(s, e) { s.deleted = 1; return s; } }).outputState()

name: deleted handler flag in sources
source: fromAll().foreachStream().when({ $init: function() { return {}; }, $deleted: function(s, e) { return s; } }).outputState()

name: no deleted handler flag
source: fromAll().foreachStream().when({ $init: function() { return {}; }, type1: function(s, e) { return s; } }).outputState()
